标题: Purchase-grade Roger Vivier RV 25ss latest leisure shoes, emphasizing comfort. A must-have for those who value comfort! Produced in Dongguan, with original development, the design is identical to the store version, with meticulous attention to detail. The classic and simple design is versatile and elegant, lightweight and soft, combining beauty and functionality. The shoe features a soft and lightweight Oxford rubber sole that is durable, flexible, and slip-resistant. The shoe is lined with imported silk/suede and sheepskin insole for added comfort. Available in sizes 35-40 (custom size 40 not eligible for return or exchange).

Introducing the latest 𝐑𝐨𝐠𝐞𝐫 𝐕𝐢𝐯𝐢* RV 25ss new flower series double crystal buckle Mary Jane shoes! The French vintage style is captivating at first sight, making you look fair and elegant. Whether paired with a dress or jeans, it exudes femininity. The small chunky heel provides stability while adding height and elongating the legs, reminiscent of ballet shoes. Continuing the essence of elegance, these double crystal buckle sandals are irresistible. Made with soft leather and classic buckles, they effortlessly present a romantic summer vibe with hidden passion, step by step overflowing with love. Materials: Original silk/ imported denim/ imported metallic cowhide. Lining: Imported sheepskin. Hardware: Original Swarovski double crystals. Sole: Original leather sole. Heel height: Approximately 4.5cm. Sizes: 34-40 (custom sizes available for 34, 40, 41).

Sizes available: #34-40 (Custom sizes 34 and 40 are non-returnable).

Roger Vivier RV Autumn/Winter new oil wax patent leather round-toe short boots with thick heel and square heel, side zipper high-heeled ankle boots. The brand's iconic Viv'choc buckle is delicately unique, resembling a ring embellishment on the trapezoidal heel of this high-heeled shoe. These short boots are made of wrinkled texture patent leather, featuring a round toe design and mini buckle embellishments on the side. Elegant and comfortable, showcasing a gentle temperament. Upper: Customized round oil wax cow patent leather. Lining: Imported sheepskin. Outsole: Original imported leather outsole. Heel height: 8.5CM. Sizes: 35-39 (custom sizes 34/40 are non-returnable and non-exchangeable).

Roger Vivier's new metal buckle pointed toe ankle boots with medium heels. This Viv'Canard leather ankle boot draws inspiration from the brand's past iconic works, blending multiple elements to showcase the Vivier style. The exquisite pointed square toe design is adorned with a round metal buckle and a lacquered heel embellished with a three-dimensional RV logo. Gentle and elegant, it exudes the charm of urban women.
